summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SEVA Shelter Management System MVP. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend login and navigation working, with minor chart rendering issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart components showing width(-1) and height(-1) rendering errors
ui_bugs.details: Charts are not displaying properly due to container sizing issues. Console shows: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'

integration_issues.issue: Admin account gets blocked frequently during testing due to multiple device login attempts
integration_issues.details: Security feature working as designed but interferes with testing. Each test creates new device ID triggering account blocking.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (login, navigation, basic UI working; charts need fixing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dashboard chart rendering issues - charts are not displaying due to container width/height calculation problems. The ResponsiveContainer components are receiving invalid dimensions (-1). This is likely a CSS or responsive design issue that needs to be addressed.
